positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic forest creature, perhaps a phoenix or a celestial deer, silhouetted against a vibrant nebula-filled sky. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring strong contrast between the creature's deep black silhouette and the swirling, bioluminescent cosmic colors of the background (deep blues, vibrant purples, and shimmering gold). The forest element should be represented by abstract, flowing line work or stylized botanical elements framing the main subject. Flat vector art style mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, highly detailed print graphic suitable for apparel. High saturation, clean lines, dramatic lighting, centered.
negative: blur, low detail, noisy, watermark, signature, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, ugly, poor quality, cartoon, realistic, photograph, grayscale, cropped
